title: Pan-Seared Fish Fillet with Algerian Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish featuring tender fish fillet, cooked to perfection with a rich tagine sauce. This recipe is a delightful combination of spices and herbs, making it a perfect meal for any occasion.

ingredients.name: Fish fillet
ingredients.notes: any white fish such as tilapia or cod

ingredients.name: Algerian tagine spice mix
ingredients.notes: available at most middle eastern stores or online

instructions: Season the fish fillet with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the fish fillet and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
While the fish is cooking, heat the tagine spice mix in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add the sliced olives and dried rose petals to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Once the fish is done, remove it from the oven and place it on a plate.
Spoon the tagine sauce over the top of the fish and serve immediately.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
